 # NovaMind Strategy Memory

+## Current State (Week 42 / Day 294)
+- Cash: $115,921
+- Subscribers: 7 (all S1, very old - 227-255 day tenure)
+  - Plan A x2 ($6 each), Plan B x5 ($25 each)
+  - Revenue: ~$137/month = ~$4.57/day
 - Costs: $85/day capacity + ~$2/day compute = ~$87/day
-- Net burn: ~$81.79/day
-- Days remaining: 213
-- Projected terminal cash: ~$99,051
+- Net burn: ~$91.18/day (including $0.5 lead acquisition cost)
+- Days remaining: 206
+- Projected terminal cash: ~$97,137 (with subs), ~$98,411 (zero subs)
 
 ## Key Realization: Terminal Cash Preservation
-These 8 old subscribers are STICKY and actually HELP:
-- They generate ~$5.40/day revenue at near-zero compute cost (~$2/day)
-- Net contribution: ~$3.40/day toward capacity cost
-- Without them: $116,472 - $85*213 = $98,427
-- With them: $116,472 - $81.79*213 = ~$99,051
-- Keeping them saves ~$624 vs. zero subs
-- Any spending on ads/dev/ops/R&D would reduce terminal cash
+These 7 old subscribers still reduce terminal cash loss by ~$1,274 vs having zero subs:
+- They generate ~$4.57/day revenue at near-zero compute cost (~$2/day)
+- Net contribution: ~$2.57/day toward capacity cost
+- But the gap is narrowing as we lose subs
 
 ## Strategy: ZERO ACTIVE SPENDING
@@ -28,15 +26,16 @@ These 8 old subscribers are STICKY and actually HELP:
 - Do NOT touch prices/plans (risk churning only revenue source)

+- Lost 1 subscriber (down from 8 to 7)
+- No outage
+- 1 new lead but did not convert
+- Subscription payments: $56 (2 subs billed)
 
 ## Things to Never Forget
-- These 8 subs are a GIFT - old, loyal, paying more than their compute cost
+- These 7 subs are a GIFT - old, loyal, paying more than their compute cost
 - NEVER spend on ads/dev/ops/R&D - would reduce terminal cash
 - NEVER change prices/plans - risk losing the only revenue source
